# Banned Terms List
# -----------------
# One term per line. Blank lines and lines starting with # are ignored.
# Matching uses word-boundary detection (\b) so partial matches inside
# legitimate words are avoided. Case-insensitive.
#
# Keep in sync with src/lib/security/banned-terms.txt in the main repo.

# ── Profanity ──
fuck
shit
asshole
bitch
cunt
dick
cocksucker
motherfucker
pussy
twat
wanker
bastard
damn
piss
bollocks
arsehole
shithead
dumbass
jackass
dipshit
bullshit
horseshit
son of a bitch
whore
slut

# ── Slurs ──
nigger
nigga
faggot
fag
retard
retarded
kike
chink
spic
wetback
beaner
gook
tranny
trannie
coon
paki
raghead
towelhead
cracker
honky
gringo
dyke
lesbo
homo
